Bash(cd C:/Users/rudi/source/pytaskforce && PYTHONPATH="src;evals" python -c "
import json, gzip

log_path = 'logs/2026-03-10T13-46-49+00-00_swe-bench-verified-mini_cTVHaQcgh7MXY88pjdMsXf.eval'
try:
    with gzip.open\(log_path, 'rt'\) as f:
        data = json.load\(f\)
except:
    with open\(log_path, 'r'\) as f:
        data = json.load\(f\)

samples = data.get\('samples', []\)
print\(f'Total samples: {len\(samples\)}'\)
print\(\)

resolved = []
failed = []

for i, s in enumerate\(samples\):
    instance_id = s.get\('id', 'unknown'\)
    scores = s.get\('scores', {}\)
    swe_score = None
    for scorer_name, scorer_data in scores.items\(\):
        if 'swe_bench' in scorer_name:
            swe_score = scorer_data.get\('value', '?'\)

    meta = s.get\('metadata', {}\)
    tf_status = meta.get\('taskforce_status', '?'\)
    tf_steps = meta.get\('taskforce_steps', 0\)
    tf_tools = meta.get\('taskforce_tool_calls', 0\)
    tokens = meta.get\('taskforce_token_usage', {}\)
    total_tok = tokens.get\('total_tokens', 0\)

    icon = 'PASS' if swe_score == 'C' else 'FAIL'
    line = f'{icon} [{i+1:2d}] {instance_id[:65]:<65s} tools={tf_tools:2d} tokens={total_tok:>8,}'
    print\(line\)
    if swe_score == 'C':
        resolved.append\(instance_id\)
    else:
        failed.append\(instance_id\)

print\(f'\\nResolved: {len\(resolved\)}/{len\(samples\)} \({100*len\(resolved\)/len\(samples\):.0f}%\)'\)
for r in resolved:
    print\(f'  + {r}'\)
" 2>&1)

import zipfile, json

zpath = \\"logs/2026-03-10T14-17-49+00-00_swe-bench-verified-mini_3XzKWc65Yp4ucA9VxJF3oS.eval\\"
with zipfile.ZipFile\(zpath\) as zf:
    with zf.open\(\\"samples/astropy__astropy-12907_epoch_1.json\\"\) as f:
        data = json.load\(f\)
    msgs = data.get\(\\"messages\\", []\)
    print\(\\"MSG COUNT:\\", len\(msgs\)\)
    for i, m in enumerate\(msgs[:3]\):
        print\(f\\"--- MSG {i} ---\\"\)
        print\(\\"  role:\\", m if isinstance\(m, str\) else m.get\(\\"role\\", \\"?\\"\)\)
        if isinstance\(m, dict\):
            c = m.get\(\\"content\\", \\"\\"\)
            if isinstance\(c, list\):
                print\(\\"  content is list, first item:\\", str\(c[0]\)[:200]\)
            else:
                print\(\\"  content trunc:\\", str\(c\)[:300]\)
"
')
